title: DID Sports Inflator Kit | Multicolor Air Pump | Manual Operation | Includes: 1 x Schrader Valve Adaptor, 3 x Ball Needles
description: Pump adapter kit consisting of 1 x flexible pump adaptor for Schrader valve, 3 x ball needles (fit Schrader/car type pump or the included pump adaptor). Good quality pump adaptor tools for a wide range of uses such as bike tyres, basketball, football, rugby ball- just about any type of ball, inflatable toy, bikes (Schrader only – not presta valves). Suitable for sports balls and more, they simply screw in using the standard pump thread.
